disclaimer: Unofficial demo. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by SEEK Limited. The look-and-feel is referenced here purely for UI/UX fidelity in a non-commercial demo. All brand assets below are recreated approximations, not official files.

assets.note: Horizontal lockup: navy circle with a white dotted right-arrow mark + black lowercase 'seek' wordmark. Recreated approximation of the supplied brand mark for demo fidelity only.
Reversed lockup for dark/navy backgrounds: white circle, navy dotted arrow, white 'seek' wordmark.
Icon-only circular mark: navy circle with the white dotted right-arrow.
App/browser icon: navy circle with the white dotted right-arrow mark.
Multi-size (16/32/48) favicon rasterised from icon.svg via scripts/generate-favicon.mjs.
512px PNG icon rasterised from icon.svg for PWA/social contexts.
